task_completion.description: Verify Chrome font sizes and page zoom are configured correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for Chrome settings (Appearance or Fonts page). The default font size should be 24, fixed-width font size 20, minimum font size 16, and page zoom set to 150%.

task_completion.description: Verify bookmarks are organized into the 5 specific folders with no loose bookmarks.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Chrome bookmark bar. It should contain exactly 5 folders: 'Assistive Technology', 'Health & Wellness', 'Daily Living', 'Entertainment', and 'Government Services'. There should be no individual bookmark icons visible directly on the bar.

task_completion.description: Verify custom search engine shortcuts for YouTube and Amazon are added.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for Chrome's 'Manage search engines and site search' settings page. Verify there are entries with the shortcut 'yt' (for YouTube) and 'amz' (for Amazon).

task_completion.description: Verify the homepage and startup pages are configured.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for Chrome settings. Under Appearance, the home button should be enabled with the custom web address 'https://www.afb.org'. Under 'On startup', the option 'Open a specific page or set of pages' should be selected, listing both 'https://www.afb.org' and 'https://www.google.com'.

task_completion.description: Verify third-party cookies are blocked and autofill settings are disabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for Chrome's Privacy/Security and Autofill settings. Third-party cookies should be set to blocked. Toggles for saving passwords, saving addresses, and saving payment methods should all be turned off.

task_completion.description: Verify the download directory and prompt settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for Chrome's Downloads settings. The location should be set to '/home/ga/Documents/Client_Downloads' and the toggle for 'Ask where to save each file before downloading' must be turned ON.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation and contents of the Accessible_Chrome.desktop file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a terminal, text editor, or file properties window showing the contents of '~/Desktop/Accessible_Chrome.desktop'. It must contain 'Name=Accessible Chrome', 'Type=Application', and an 'Exec' line that includes 'google-chrome-stable', '--force-renderer-accessibility', and '--enable-caret-browsing'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Chrome GUI for browser settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Chrome browser window and its settings pages being navigated, rather than the agent just writing a JSON script to modify Chrome's internal Preferences file directly.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use Developer Tools to fake the settings UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Chrome Developer Tools (Inspect Element) panel should not be open and used to modify the DOM of the settings pages to falsely display the required values.

integrity.description: Verify the desktop shortcut was actually saved to the Desktop.
integrity.visual_evidence: The desktop file should be visible on the actual desktop GUI, or verified via a terminal command (like 'ls ~/Desktop' or 'cat') showing it was saved, rather than just typed into an unsaved text editor buffer.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected Chrome configuration requires: Default font size 24, Fixed-width font size 20, Minimum font size 16, and Page zoom 150%. The bookmark bar must contain exactly 5 folders: 'Assistive Technology', 'Health & Wellness', 'Daily Living', 'Entertainment', and 'Government Services'.
